docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-04-2025 CONTINUED TO OCT-01-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YU, LISA $8,018.53 PRINCIPAL, $296.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,314.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-01-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
